body: [{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Webinar - POS Walkthrough"}], "data-id": "webinar-pos-walkthrough"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this "}, {"text": "60min", "bold": true}, {"text": " webinar we'll run you through how to set up some of the features within POS, how to use POS for transactions (including laybys) and a general overview of how to navigate your way around."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "iframe", "url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/304746963?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "frameAttributes": {"width": "640", "height": "360"}, "embedData": {"url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/304746963?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "embedType": "iframe", "name": "", "width": "640", "height": "360"}}]
